name: openai-agentic-chat-scaffold
description: Monorepo scaffold: Next.js chat UI + Express backend + OpenAI Agents SDK + MCP notes server

scripts.dev: concurrently -n mcp,api,web -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @scaffold/mcp-notes" "npm run dev -w @scaffold/api" "npm run dev -w @scaffold/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @scaffold/shared && npm run build -w @scaffold/api && npm run build -w @scaffold/web
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/.next apps/*/dist packages/*/dist
